institution.name: The University of Tennessee Health Science Center

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at The University of Tennessee Health Science Center are 3% below 6-year earnings ($68.7k → $66.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at The University of Tennessee Health Science Center fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at The University of Tennessee Health Science Center rose 49% between 2021 and 2024 (264 → 394).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at The University of Tennessee Health Science Center are 42% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($66.3k vs $46.7k).
